headline: Lennar (LEN) Valuation Check As Shares Trade Near Analyst Targets Despite Recent Choppy Returns
summary: Lennar: context for recent stock performance Lennar (LEN) has been drawing attention after recent share moves, with the stock showing mixed returns over different timeframes and currently trading around US$94. This has put investor focus on how its homebuilding and related services business is positioned. See our latest analysis for Lennar. Recent trading has been choppy, with a 4.21% 1 month share price return offset by a 14.95% 3 month share price decline and a 1 year total shareholder...
